no: Geomantic Sorcerer kit by hlidskialf. Combines sorcerer spellcasting with druid spells and shapeshifting. 50 components: 1 core kit + 49 portrait options for shapeshift forms (bear, cat, dog, leopard, moose, panther, rat, snake, wolf). Only cn:0 is needed for gameplay; portraits are cosmetic

passive.desc: 15% XP penalty (receives only 85% of earned XP)

Learns druid spells as arcane: CLW/Entangle/Shillelagh (lv1), Barkskin/Flame Blade (lv3), Call Lightning/Summon Insects (lv5), Free Action/Poison (lv7), Iron Skins/Insect Plague (lv8), Heal/Creeping Doom/Earthquake (lv11-13). Custom: Wave Spray (lv1), Tornado/Shambling Mound (lv15).

activated.effects: Shift into 9 animal forms (Bear, Cat, Dog, Leopard, Moose, Panther, Rat, Snake, Wolf). Each has unique abilities.

restrictions.alignment: Any Neutral only (LN, TN, CN, NG, NE)
restrictions.items: Requires WIS 13, CHA 9. Same weapons as base sorcerer. No dual-classing.

spellRestrictions.note: Learns druid spells as arcane plus standard wizard spells

statBonus.note: Innate stat modifiers: -2 STR, -2 DEX, -2 CON

hlaPool.note: Unique Quintessence HLA tree with 5 chains per research

new: Sorcerer drawing power from the natural world. Druid-like spontaneous casting with nature spells.

sum: Sorcerer/Druid hybrid kit with unique shapeshifting and custom HLAs. Includes 49 optional portraits for each shapeshift animal form.

co.no: Core Geomantic Sorcerer kit. Sorcerer casting with druid spells, shapeshifting abilities, custom HLA progression
Enables custom portraits for shapeshift forms. Requires core kit (cn:0). Choose Male or Female below
co.tp2n:
Portraits for Druidic Shapeshifting
DO NOT INSTALL THIS IF YOU ARE GOING TO GIVE THE KIT TO A NPC
